subject: System crash - ID: 50123
body: Server crashed during migration. Reference BUG-50123 for details.

body: All P1 incident updates must go into #ops-critical from now on per the new protocol.

body: Release 4.0.1 introduced a subtle regression in the date picker. Otherwise solid update.

body: Our finance team is disputing INV-7731. The amount does not match the purchase order.

subject: Memory leak in build BUILD-992
body: Profiling shows a memory leak introduced in BUILD-992. Heap grows 50MB per hour.

subject: Positive review on v1.9.8
body: v1.9.8 is the most stable release yet. Performance improvements are very noticeable.

subject: Decommission server: SRV-LEGACY-03
body: SRV-LEGACY-03 is scheduled for decommission next Tuesday. Confirm data migration is complete.

body: Campaign CAMP-34 is sending duplicate emails to leads. Needs immediate fix before the 9 AM blast.

subject: Update on migration: MIG-PHASE-2
body: MIG-PHASE-2 completed successfully. All user data verified. Ready to proceed to phase 3.

subject: Crash on hotfix: FIX-1102
body: FIX-1102 itself introduced a new null pointer crash on the payments page. Rolling back now.
